name: @waltzofwhispers/flight-assistant-plugin
description: Book a flight end to end, in one conversation.

scripts.verify:publish-dry-run: echo 'ClawHub package publish no longer supports dry-run for code plugins. Use the explicit publish command in README after typecheck.'
scripts.verify:cleanroom-install: TMP_HOME=$(mktemp -d /tmp/waltz-openclaw-cleanroom.XXXXXX) && PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH" HOME="$TMP_HOME" bunx openclaw plugins install -l "$PWD" && test -f "$TMP_HOME/.openclaw/openclaw.json" && test -f "$TMP_HOME/.openclaw/waltz-flight-assistant/openclaw-id.txt" && echo "Clean-room OpenClaw home: $TMP_HOME/.openclaw" && cat "$TMP_HOME/.openclaw/openclaw.json"
